name: Antipasto#1
recipeIngredient: 1 can (14 oz) Italian tuna, packed in olive oil
1 small jar roasted red peppers, packed in vinegar and oil
1 small jar green bell peppers, packed in vinegar and oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Arrange lettuce on a platter, leaving a hole in the middle large enough to hold the can of tuna.
2. Drain oil from the can over the lettuce, then place tuna in the center of the platter.
3. Divide the platter into sections and place half a slice of cheese in each section.
4. On top of the cheese, place one rolled slice of each type of meat.
5. Drizzle liquid from the red pepper jar over all, then randomly arrange peppers, olives, and tomatoes around the platter.
6. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
7. Pour additional olive oil over everything.
